fields.title: [session-api] Add session-cli and session-mcp for session subcommands

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. session-cli supports check-in, lookup, query, peek-range, and peek-skeleton subcommands. 2. session-mcp server exposes corresponding tools with JSON schema validation. 3. CLI and MCP surfaces return compact TOON or JSON outputs. 4. Focused integration tests cover CLI and MCP tool invocations.
fields.title: [session-api] Add session-cli and session-mcp for session subcommands
